repos.name: IINemo/thinkbooster
repos.description: Open-source framework for test-time compute scaling of LLMs. Includes a visual debugger for inspecting reasoning traces and an endpoint that provides OpenAI-compatible API.

repos.name: pr0mila/Frontier-AI-Concepts
repos.description: A technical reading guide on Mechanistic Interpretability, Test-Time Compute Scaling, and Native Multimodal Pretraining. Built for ML practitioners, not beginners.

repos.name: Hritikd/hermes
repos.description: Test-time compute scaling engine with Process Reward Models, MCTS, and beam search — o1-style reasoning infrastructure

repos.name: zizhao-hu/llm-alignment-compute-scaling
repos.description: Audit how safety alignment degrades as a function of test-time compute budget — best-of-N sampling, extended CoT, and verifier-guided search.

repos.name: jrajath94/stair-tts-scaling-laws
repos.description: STAIR: Per-Problem Discrete Structure in Test-Time Compute Scaling for LLM Reasoning — NeurIPS 2025 submission

repos.name: Multi-Agent-LLMs/lm-evaluation-harness
repos.description: Fork from EleutherAI’s lm‑evaluation‑harness with added multi‑agent and single‑agent test‑time inference scaling pipelines for LLM evaluation with compute-estimation for the paper "Multi-Agent Reasoning Improves Compute Efficiency: Pareto-Optimal Scaling of Test-Time"

repos.name: PotatoJnny/Scaling-Law-Guided-search
repos.description: Scaling-Law Guided (SLG) Search: Optimizing LLM test-time compute via tail estimation and dynamic budget allocation.

repos.name: neosun100/Step-Audio-R1.1
repos.description: Step-Audio-R1.1: The First Audio Language Model with Test-Time Compute Scaling. All-in-One Docker with vLLM + Web UI + API.

repos.name: AjaySaini15/tana-ai-context-hub
repos.description: Three Claude Code skills (ai-memory-setup, ai-memory-sync, skill-improve) that create a self-improving AI skill system with Tana as the source of truth. Skills compound over time — every correction is captured, versioned, and propagated to all configured LLM tool paths automatically.

repos.name: nayyarsan/reflexloop
repos.description: Self-refining AI agents for software development — critique every session, accumulate evidence, and automatically improve their own system prompts. Works with Claude Code & GitHub Copilot.

repos.name: MohammedAmine0012/Continuous-Fine-Tuning-Pipeline-for-LLMs-Airflow-HuggingFace-LoRA-
repos.description: A production-grade Self-Improving AI System that continuously fine-tunes a Large Language Model (DeepSeek Coder) on new domain-specific data, evaluates its quality, and automatically deploys it for high-performance inference.

repos.name: Wilson0406/Self-Improving-LLM-Agent
repos.description: A dual-agent, feedback-driven document extraction system using GPT-5 and Azure Document Intelligence that automatically improves its own prompts, reducing manual rule updates and adapting to evolving business requirements.

repos.name: samibs/guardloop.dev
repos.description: Guardloop.dev is a self-improving AI governance system that learns from LLM mistakes, generates dynamic guardrails, and prevents repeated failures. It automatically enforces coding standards, security requirements, and compliance rules across Claude, Gemini, Codex, and other AI tools.

repos.name: MajidGhosian/Agentic-AI-Learning-Lab
repos.description: A hands-on repository for learning Agentic AI through small, practical projects. It covers key concepts like ReAct agents, tool use, memory, planning, reflection, multi-agent systems, RAG, and automation. Each module builds real-world AI skills by implementing autonomous, goal-driven systems using modern LLM frameworks and tools.

repos.name: FlashVision/FlashAgent
repos.description: Lightweight AI agent framework with tool use, planning, and multi-step reasoning

repos.name: amori27/agentic-ai-framework
repos.description: Autonomous AI agent frameworks with tool use, planning, and multi-agent coordination

repos.name: rysweet/amplihack-agent-eval
repos.description: Evaluation framework for goal-seeking AI agents: memory recall, tool use, planning, reasoning

repos.name: linmy666/madcop
repos.description: madcop — local-first AI agent framework. Middleware-driven plan-execute loop, sub-agents, crash recovery (WAL), tool-use, and a self-diagnose CLI. Built on Qian engineering cybernetics.

repos.name: memex-lab/dart_agent_core
repos.description: Dart framework for stateful AI agents: tool use, skills, sub-agent delegation, planning, streaming, evals, and multi-provider LLM support.

repos.name: Nodenester/AutonomousAgent
repos.description: Autonomous AI agent framework (April 2024). Self-directing agent loop with planning, task decomposition, vector RAG memory, and tool use — built for local LLMs. C#, .NET 8.

repos.name: acebot712/agent-from-scratch
repos.description: Build your own ~600-800 line AI agent framework in pure Python — tool use, memory, planning, multi-agent, evals. Understand every agent framework by building one. Course repo, tagged per module.
